name: Puree of Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups VEAL STOCK OR LOW SODIUM BEEF BROTH
recipeInstructions:
1. MELT butter in a 3-quart, heavy-bottomed pan over low heat, preferably on cast iron or copper.
2. ADD onions and cook, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. UNCOVER and continue to cook, stirring frequently, until onions turn a deep golden color, about 30-40 minutes.
4. ADD stock and nutmeg. COVER and bring to a boil.
5. REDUCE heat and simmer until the mixture is smooth and thickened.
6. IN A SEPARATE SMALL PAN, BRING beer to a boil over medium heat. BOIL until reduced by half.
7. REMOVE from heat and ADD cheese, stirring until melted.
8. TRANSFER the cheese mixture into a blender or food processor and PUREE until very smooth.
9. RETURN the puree to the pan containing the onion mixture.
10. ADD the reserved liquid (beer) and the cheese mixture. ADD salt and season with pepper to taste.
11. SERVE piping hot in a tureen. Makes 5 servings.
